title: Flow Barware Shot Glasses | Coloured Heavy Base Shot Glass Set of 6 | 50ml Stackable Coloured Shot Glass Set for Vodka, Tequila, Whisky Shots | Multicoloured Shooter Sets
features: SET OF 6 SHOT GLASSES - COOL SHOTS! How cool is this set of 6 Coloured Shot Glasses ? A great way to serve your alcohol shots, these novelty shot glasses are made from durable glass & feature a colourful heavy base with a fluted top that allows each shot glass to be stacked on top of each other, Keep in the freezer for an extra chilled shot!

LARGE SHOT GLASSES - These large shot glasses measure 7 x 4 X 4cm and can hold both a standard 25ml & a full 50ml shot measure to the rim. Use them for Vodka shots, tequila shot glasses or as Jager Bomb Shot Glasses. The perfect addition to any home bar, this dishwasher safe glass set is perfect for home parties, bars, restaurants & nightclubs. Reusable so are better for the environment then plastic shot glasses

COLOURED GLASSES - This fun shot glasses set includes 6 clear shot glasses, with each shot glass featuring a different colour at the base. Colours include green, blue, red, purple, pink and orange to create a cool, stylish, and fun look to your home bar. Your very own rainbow glasses will ensure you never get your glasses mixed up again.

DURABLE & VERSATILE - The shots glasses durability makes them suitable for both celebrations and everyday practicality. If alcoholic shots aren't your thing these cute coloured glasses are perfect for serving espresso shots, Wheatgrass juce shots, detox shots or for mini desserts. A fabulous versatile addition to your glassware collection

SLEEK AND STYLISH - These awesome shot cups are sleek, stylish and will certainly add colour to any home bar. Whether you are looking for a classic vodka glass, tequila glasses or limoncello glasses, these vodka shot glasses are sure to impress. Perfect for any celebratory occasion, this shot glass gift set comes complete in a stylish retail box ready to wrap.
